{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6913191?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DeathsPirate", "id": 6913191, "login": "DeathsPirate", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY5MTMxOTE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41279", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Summary

The text-to-speech generation endpoint (`POST /api/v1/text-to-speech/generate`) is whitelisted (no auth) and accepts a `credentialId` directly in the request body. When called without a `chatflowId`, the endpoint uses the provided `credentialId` to decrypt the stored credential (e.g., OpenAI or ElevenLabs API key) and generate speech.

### Root Cause

```typescript
// packages/server/src/controllers/text-to-speech/index.ts:58-64
} else {
    // Use TTS config from request body
    provider = bodyProvider
    credentialId = bodyCredentialId  // ← attacker-controlled credential ID
    voice = bodyVoice
    model = bodyModel
}
```

### Docker Validation

`POST /api/v1/text-to-speech/generate` with arbitrary `credentialId` in body: endpoint processes request, sends SSE `tts_start` event, only fails when credential doesn't exist — proves code path runs without authentication.

### Impact

- Use victim's API keys (OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Azure, Google) without authorization
- Burn API credits on the victim's account
- Generate unlimited speech content at victim's expense
- Combined with credential ID leak from Finding 2, this is trivially exploitable

### Suggested Fix

Remove the TTS endpoint from `WHITELIST_URLS` or validate that the credential belongs to the chatflow being used:

```typescript
// Only allow credentialId when it matches the chatflow's TTS configuration
if (!chatflowId) {
    return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' })
}
```

---

## References

- `packages/server/src/controllers/text-to-speech/index.ts` lines 10-162
- `packages/server/src/utils/constants.ts` line 41 (whitelist entry)

## Credits

title: Flowise: Unauthenticated TTS endpoint accepts arbitrary credential IDs — enables API credit abuse via stored credentials
